name: Party Date
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates and boiling water until cool.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, shortening, eggs, cocoa, and flour. Stir well.
3. Add baking soda to the date mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour batter into two greased loaf pans.
5. Sprinkle sugar, chopped nuts, and chocolate bits evenly over the top of each pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
7. Allow to cool slightly before slicing and serving hot.
8. Garnish with whipped cream.
